frames: The agent stands upright with arms bent, appearing stable.
It begins to lean forward, bending at the waist, with arms moving slightly.
The agent continues to bend forward, lifting and bending its right leg.
It enters a deep crouch, with both knees bent and arms extended forward.
The agent starts to fall forward, becoming horizontal in mid-air.
It is fully airborne, body parallel to the ground, with bent legs and extended arms.
The agent continues its fall, maintaining a horizontal posture.
It lands flat on its front, with all limbs making contact, appearing to have collapsed.
